'''mashutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:podalgia|podalgia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:podalgia|podalgia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mashutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshitith|mæshitith]] || [[word:mæshitij|mæshitij]] || [[word:mæshitish|mæshitish]] || [[word:mæshiti|mæshiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashushututh|mashushututh]] || [[word:mashushutuj|mashushutuj]] || [[word:mashushutush|mashushutush]] || [[word:mashushutu|mashushutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashututh|mashututh]] || [[word:mashutuj|mashutuj]] || [[word:mashutush|mashutush]] || [[word:mashutu|mashutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashuftuth|mashuftuth]] || [[word:mashuftuj|mashuftuj]] || [[word:mashuftush|mashuftush]] || [[word:mashuftuf|mashuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashututhu|mashututhu]] || [[word:mashutuju|mashutuju]] || [[word:mashutushu|mashutushu]] || [[word:mashutuku|mashutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashututh|mashututh]] || [[word:mashutuj|mashutuj]] || [[word:mashutush|mashutush]] || [[word:mashutu|mashutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashututhul|mashututhul]] || [[word:mashutujul|mashutujul]] || [[word:mashutushul|mashutushul]] || [[word:mashutukul|mashutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashututhuthu|mashututhuthu]] || [[word:mashutujuju|mashutujuju]] || [[word:mashutushushu|mashutushushu]] || [[word:mashutuku|mashutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashututhun|mashututhun]] || [[word:mashutujun|mashutujun]] || [[word:mashutushun|mashutushun]] || [[word:mashutukun|mashutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashututhuoro|mashututhuoro]] || [[word:mashutujuoro|mashutujuoro]] || [[word:mashutushuoro|mashutushuoro]] || [[word:mashutukuoro|mashutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
